translations.pt: Eu estou dando um beijo nele.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative (1st person singular); subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present, 1st person singular) expressing a ditransitive action; takes a dative recipient and an accusative direct object.
Personal pronoun in dative (3rd person singular masculine); indirect object/recipient of the giving event.

Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of the verb.

sentences.target: Sie will keinen Kuss vor der Kamera.
sentences.reading: /ziː vɪl ˈkaɪ̯nən kʊs fɔʁ deːɐ̯ ˈkaməʁa/

translations.de: Sie will keinen Kuss vor der Kamera.
translations.ipa: /ziː vɪl ˈkaɪ̯nən kʊs fɔʁ deːɐ̯ ˈkaməʁa/
translations.en: She doesn’t want a kiss in front of the camera.
translations.es: Ella no quiere un beso frente a la cámara.
translations.fr: Elle ne veut pas de bisou devant la caméra.
translations.it: Non vuole un bacio davanti alla telecamera.
translations.ru: Она не хочет целоваться на камеру.
translations.pt: Ela não quer um beijo na frente da câmera.
translations.he: היא לא רוצה נשיקה מול המצלמה.
translations.vi: Cô ấy không muốn hôn trước ống kính.
translations.ar: هي لا تريد قبلة أمام الكاميرا.
translations.nl: Ze wil geen kus voor de camera.
translations.uk: Вона не хоче цілуватися на камеру.
translations.hu: Nem akar csókot a kamera előtt.
translations.hi: वह कैमरे के सामने किस नहीं करना चाहती।
translations.pl: Ona nie chce pocałunku przed kamerą.
translations.el: Δεν θέλει φιλί μπροστά στην κάμερα.
translations.nb: Hun vil ikke ha et kyss foran kameraet.
translations.id: Dia tidak mau ciuman di depan kamera.
translations.sv: Hon vill inte ha en kyss framför kameran.
translations.ro: Ea nu vrea un sărut în fața camerei.
translations.da: Hun vil ikke have et kys foran kameraet.
translations.fi: Hän ei halua suudelmaa kameran edessä.
translations.ja: 彼女はカメラの前でキスしたくない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative (3rd person singular feminine); subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb (present, 3rd person singular) expressing desire; here takes an NP complement rather than a verbal complement.
Negative determiner inflected for masculine accusative singular; negates the noun it modifies.
Common noun (masculine singular); object of the verb; modified by the following PP.
Preposition indicating location; governs dative and introduces the oblique nominal 'der Kamera'.
Definite article inflected for dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Kamera' within the PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'vor'.

sentences.target: Unser erster Kuss war super peinlich.

translations.de: Unser erster Kuss war super peinlich.
translations.en: Our first kiss was super embarrassing.
translations.es: Nuestro primer beso fue súper vergonzoso.
translations.fr: Notre premier baiser était super gênant.
translations.it: Il nostro primo bacio è stato super imbarazzante.
translations.ru: Наш первый поцелуй был ужасно неловким.
translations.pt: Nosso primeiro beijo foi super constrangedor.
translations.he: הנשיקה הראשונה שלנו הייתה ממש מביכה.
translations.vi: Nụ hôn đầu của chúng tôi cực kỳ ngượng.
translations.nl: Onze eerste kus was super gênant.
translations.uk: Наш перший поцілунок був дуже ніяковий.
translations.hu: Az első csókunk szuper kínos volt.
translations.hi: हमारा पहला किस बहुत ही शर्मनाक था।
translations.pl: Nasz pierwszy pocałunek był mega niezręczny.
translations.el: Το πρώτο μας φιλί ήταν πάρα πολύ αμήχανο.
translations.nb: Vårt første kyss var skikkelig pinlig.
translations.ro: Primul nostru sărut a fost super stânjenitor.
translations.cs: Náš první polibek byl strašně trapný.
translations.da: Vores første kys var vildt pinligt.
translations.ja: 初めてのキスはすごく恥ずかしかった。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person plural) in attributive use; modifies 'Kuss'.
Ordinal adjective in attributive position; agrees with the noun it modifies.
Common noun (masculine); here the subject of the clause.
Finite copular auxiliary (past, 3rd person singular) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Degree adverb functioning as an intensifier; modifies the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective serving as the subject complement in a copular construction.

sentences.target: Er schickt mir einen Kuss per Emoji.
sentences.reading: /eːʁ ʃɪkt miːʁ ˈaɪ̯nən kʊs pɛʁ eˈmoːdʒi/

translations.de: Er schickt mir einen Kuss per Emoji.
translations.ipa: /eːʁ ʃɪkt miːʁ ˈaɪ̯nən kʊs pɛʁ eˈmoːdʒi/
translations.en: He sends me a kiss via emoji.
translations.es: Me manda un emoji de beso.
translations.zh-Hans: 他给我发一个亲吻表情。
translations.yue: 佢畀我發個飛吻表情符號。
translations.ru: Он присылает мне эмодзи с поцелуем.
translations.pt: Ele me manda um emoji de beijo.
translations.vi: Anh ấy gửi cho tôi emoji hôn.
translations.uk: Він надсилає мені емодзі з поцілунком.
translations.hi: वह मुझे किस वाला इमोजी भेजता है।
translations.el: Μου στέλνει ένα emoji με φιλί.
translations.ro: Îmi trimite un emoji cu un sărut.
translations.ja: 彼はキスの絵文字を送ってくる。
